pr_text:
## Title: Fix double-free vulnerability in NR UE initial synchronization

### Summary
The `nr_initial_sync` function contains a double-free bug when copying synchronization results. When a cell is detected, the code performs a struct copy (`res = *ssbInfo`) that duplicates the `rxdata` pointer array. The original `ssbInfo->rxdata` buffers are subsequently freed within the function, but the copied `res.rxdata` pointers remain dangling. When the caller later frees the `res` structure, the same mem
